name: Object of Obsession Female Version
description:
You come out of your college dorm, and notice something is off, people suddenly swarm you vying for your attention. Women, even the faculty. Whatever this phenomenon is only applies to the school.

Will you indulge in the newfound popularity and devotion? Or find out the possible cause and put an end to it?

There are 20 side characters, each with their own personality

Potential non-con

Female only version. Male and female version on my profile.

Male only soon
creator: Toats
